title: Haiphong、Haiphong — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Haiphong、Haiphongの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

HaiphongはHaiphongにある人口2,100,000の都市です。Vietnam’s major port city and industrial hub, offering a more affordable and less crowded alternative to Hanoi with a growing economy and improving infrastructure.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
